introSection: MotoGee is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: MotoGee is a motorbike roller coaster with a compact layout.

fullText:
MotoGee is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

MotoGee is a motorbike roller coaster with a compact layout.
